text:
Not later than the 15th day after the date of receiving a copy of the application from the governor, the commissioner shall publish notice of the application in:

(1) the Texas Register;

(2) the newspaper having the greatest general circulation in Travis County and in each of the five most populous counties in the state; and

(3) a newspaper in the adjacent coastal county and in each county that adjoins the adjacent coastal county in which notice is not otherwise required to be published under this section.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 52. Tex. Deepwater Port Procedures Act
##### § 52.007 — Publication of Notice

Not later than the 15th day after the date of receiving a copy of the application from the governor, the commissioner shall publish notice of the application in:

    (1) the Texas Register;

    (2) the newspaper having the greatest general circulation in Travis County and in each of the five most populous counties in the state; and

    (3) a newspaper in the adjacent coastal county and in each county that adjoins the adjacent coastal county in which notice is not otherwise required to be published under this section.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: Not later than the 15th day after the date of receiving a copy of the application from the governor, the commissioner shall publish notice of the application in:
the newspaper having the greatest general circulation in Travis County and in each of the five most populous counties in the state; and
a newspaper in the adjacent coastal county and in each county that adjoins the adjacent coastal county in which notice is not otherwise required to be published under this section.
